title: APNS-200 My Beloved Fiancee Had Disappeared, But Just Now, I Received A DVD Of Her Getting G*******g Fucked... Natsuki Kisaragi
description: Kitayama, the son of a wealthy clan, attends the same university as his childhood friend Natsuki, a daughter of a similarly wealthy family, and is currently living together. Despite being a student, Kitayama has virtually inherited one of his father's companies and is engaged to Natsuki. They should have been promised a happy future. One day, people who had a grudge against Kitayama kidnapped Natsuki, aiming for Kitayama's absence. Later, what arrived under Kitayama was a DVD containing Natsuki's pant. [* The image and sound may be distorted, but please note that this is not a defect of the product itself.]
maker: オーロラプロジェクト・アネックス
